usage.selection: Read this compact index first to select a poster style family.
usage.details: After selecting a family, read the listed reference files only.
usage.assets: Use asset_map entries to place exact logo and culture assets.
usage.visual_styles: Use visual_style_options to guide the user's style choice. Users may choose a built-in style, mix styles, describe a desired style, or leave it blank. Read visual-style-catalog.md for full details.

custom_visual_style.instruction: If the user describes the desired style instead of choosing a sample, extract mood, typography, layout density, color, texture, and imagery cues. Map the description to the closest built-in style or blend two styles. Use named websites only as inspiration; do not copy protected screenshots, proprietary illustrations, or exact layouts.

visual_style_options.name: 极简商务 / Minimal Business
visual_style_options.best_for: Formal notices, leadership messages, strategy, external-facing brand statements.

visual_style_options.name: 新野兽派色彩 / Neo Fauvist Color
visual_style_options.best_for: Festivals, culture campaigns, energetic internal activity posters.

visual_style_options.name: 瑞士网格 / Swiss Grid
visual_style_options.best_for: Reports, process notices, policies, meeting screens.

visual_style_options.name: Bento 信息卡 / Bento Grid
visual_style_options.best_for: Multi-point announcements, data, agendas, benefits, long posters.

visual_style_options.name: 软萌 3D IP / Soft 3D Mascot
visual_style_options.best_for: Values, employee engagement, recognition, friendly culture posters.

visual_style_options.name: 液态玻璃科技 / Liquid Glass Tech
visual_style_options.best_for: Digitalization, AI, HRAS platforms, technology service.

visual_style_options.name: 杂志拼贴 / Editorial Collage
visual_style_options.best_for: Employee stories, team profiles, event recaps, culture features.

visual_style_options.name: 赛博数据 / Neon Data Dash
visual_style_options.best_for: Tech launches, battle reports, AI/data topics, countdowns.

visual_style_options.name: 触感纸艺 / Tactile Paper
visual_style_options.best_for: Care, wellbeing, employee letters, holiday greetings.

visual_style_options.name: 液态超现实 / Liquid Gradient World
visual_style_options.best_for: Future vision, innovation, festival visuals, campaign teasers.

visual_style_options.name: 温暖人文 / Warm Humanist
visual_style_options.best_for: Employee stories, onboarding, culture care, recognition.

style_families.name: Corporate Blue Orange
style_families.best_for: Group brand posters, formal announcements, strategy, external-facing communication, service positioning, executive/internal authority contexts.
style_families.avoid_for: Very playful employee culture scenes where value IP should lead.
style_families.typography: Source Han Sans / 思源黑体

style_families.name: Values IP Card
style_families.best_for: Values posters, culture communication, employee engagement, festival greetings, internal recognition, team activities.
style_families.avoid_for: Board, legal, compliance, investor, or serious external posters.
style_families.typography: Rounded bold display plus Source Han Sans body

style_families.name: Meeting Room Screen
style_families.best_for: Feishu projection posters, meeting-room screens, 16:9 agenda or recognition screen visuals.
style_families.avoid_for: Long mobile posters and dense reading materials.
style_families.typography: Large Source Han Sans / 思源黑体

style_families.name: HRAS Sub-Brand
style_families.best_for: HRAS, 人力综合条线, employee service, HR operations, onboarding, internal HR campaigns.
style_families.avoid_for: General group brand posters unrelated to HRAS.
style_families.typography: Source Han Sans / 思源黑体

style_families.name: Event Campaign
style_families.best_for: Internal activity posters, campaign teasers, holiday posters, recognition announcements, mixed culture-brand visuals.
style_families.avoid_for: Highly formal group identity pages requiring strict VI restraint.
style_families.typography: Strong Source Han Sans headlines with friendly accent treatments
